name: Classic Pullover Hoodie
description: Stay warm and stylish with this premium cotton pullover hoodie. Designed with a soft fleece interior, adjustable drawstring hood, and spacious kangaroo pocket, it delivers exceptional comfort for everyday wear. Whether you're heading out with friends, traveling, or relaxing at home, this hoodie offers the perfect combination of durability, warmth, and modern streetwear style.

name: Premium Zip-Up Hoodie
description: Made from premium cotton-blend fleece, this zip-up hoodie provides outstanding warmth, flexibility, and all-day comfort. Featuring a full-length zipper, ribbed cuffs, and a modern athletic fit, it's perfect for casual outings, travel, gym sessions, or layering during colder seasons.

name: Graphic Streetwear Hoodie
description: Designed for modern streetwear lovers, this graphic hoodie features premium fabric, eye-catching prints, and a relaxed oversized fit. The brushed fleece interior provides superior warmth and comfort, making it ideal for winter days, evening outings, and everyday casual fashion.

name: Formal Cotton Shirt
description: This premium formal shirt is tailored from soft, breathable cotton to provide exceptional comfort throughout your working day. Featuring a modern slim-fit design, wrinkle-resistant fabric, and premium stitching, it creates a professional appearance. Perfect for office meetings, presentations, interviews, or formal occasions where confidence and style matter.

name: Slim Fit Oxford Shirt
description: Crafted with premium Oxford cotton, this slim-fit shirt offers a perfect combination of durability, elegance, and comfort. Its button-down collar and modern tailoring create a polished appearance suitable for business meetings, dinner parties, and casual outings. A versatile wardrobe essential that complements both formal trousers and denim jeans.

name: Checked Casual Shirt
description: Refresh your casual wardrobe with this stylish checked shirt, designed from lightweight and breathable cotton fabric. The timeless check pattern, comfortable regular fit, and durable construction make it perfect for everyday wear, weekend outings, travel, or casual office environments while maintaining a smart and relaxed appearance.

name: Basic Crew Neck T-Shirt
description: Made from premium combed cotton, this basic crew neck T-shirt offers exceptional softness, breathability, and all-day comfort. Its minimalist design makes it easy to pair with jeans, shorts, or joggers for a clean casual look. The durable fabric maintains its shape and color even after multiple washes, making it a reliable everyday essential.

name: Premium Polo T-Shirt
description: Experience premium comfort with this stylish polo T-shirt, crafted from breathable pique cotton fabric for superior softness and durability. The classic collar, modern fit, and elegant finish make it suitable for casual office wear, weekend outings, and social gatherings while maintaining a polished and fashionable appearance.

name: Graphic Printed T-Shirt
description: Stand out with this trendy graphic printed T-shirt featuring eye-catching artwork and premium-quality cotton fabric. Lightweight, breathable, and designed for maximum comfort, it is perfect for college students, casual outings, and anyone looking to express their personality through modern streetwear fashion.

name: Leather Wallet
description: Crafted from premium genuine leather, this wallet features multiple card slots, spacious cash compartments, and a slim, minimalist profile. Built for durability and everyday convenience, it combines elegance with functionality, making it an essential accessory for professionals, students, and daily use.

name: Classic Analog Watch
description: This elegant analog watch features a stainless steel case, scratch-resistant glass, and reliable quartz movement for precise timekeeping. The premium leather strap and sophisticated dial design make it suitable for business meetings, formal occasions, and everyday wear, adding timeless style to any outfit.

name: Premium Leather Belt
description: Complete your wardrobe with this premium leather belt, expertly crafted from high-quality leather and finished with a durable metal buckle. Its classic design complements both formal trousers and casual jeans, while the sturdy construction ensures long-lasting performance, comfort, and everyday reliability.
